channel.title: Smartypants
channel.description: Latest releases from Smartypants on Dropout.tv

item.title: Uniforms, Therapy, Reboots
item.description:
David promotes uniforms. Alexis tricks men to get therapy. Demi pitches his reboot for "Big."

Duration: 38:45

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, david cyr kerns, alexis nikole nelson, demi adejuyigbe

item.title: Second Families, Sacagawea, Linda Hamilton
item.description:
Lily supports gender equality. Tai honors a Native American icon. Cameron praises Sarah Connor.

Duration: 32:30

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, lily du, tai leclaire, cameron esposito
